candidate.description: Balanced tree index supporting range scans and point lookups; most common default index type in relational databases.

l2s.scope_1line: Balanced-tree indexes; default index type in most RDBMS engines.
O(1) equality indexes; no range support.
Multi-column indexes sensitive to column order.

l1s.scope_1line: Physical storage layer: page layout, buffer pool, WAL.
